member.name: M:HumTrack.App.MainWindow.RebuildOverlayCanvas
member.summary: Clears and rebuilds all overlay shapes directly on OverlayCanvas. This is 100% reliable compared to ItemsControl Canvas positioning.

member.name: M:HumTrack.App.MainWindow.InitializeComponent(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wires up the controls and optionally loads XAML markup and attaches dev tools (if Avalonia.Diagnostics package is referenced).
member.param: Should the XAML be loaded into the component.
Should the dev tools be attached.

member.name: T:HumTrack.App.Services.BitmapConverter
member.summary: Converts pure EmguCV Mat structures into rendering-ready Avalonia Bitmap classes safely without leaking unmanaged memory buffers. Extremely fast memory pointer copy.

member.name: M:HumTrack.App.Services.BitmapConverter.CreateWriteableBitmapFromMat(Emgu.CV.Mat)
member.summary: Creates an Avalonia Bitmap representing the provided BGR Mat image. Caller is responsible for disposing the returning bitmap.

member.name: M:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.MainViewModel.LoadVideo(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a video file and shows the first frame.

member.name: M:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.MainViewModel.AddMarkerAt(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Called by MainWindow when the user clicks the video image. x/y are in display pixels; we must reverse-scale them back to native video pixels.

member.name: M:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.MainViewModel.UpdateScale(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Called by code-behind when the display Image has been measured, so we can compute the scale between display pixels and native video pixels.

member.name: F:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.MainViewModel.playPauseCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.MainViewModel.PlayPauseCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.MainViewModel.stopCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.MainViewModel.StopCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect
member.summary: A UI-bindable representation of a tracked marker bounding box. All coordinates are in the display-scaled pixel space.

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.X
member.summary: Left edge of bounding box (display pixels).

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.Y
member.summary: Top edge of bounding box (display pixels).

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.W
member.summary: Width of bounding box (display pixels).

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.H
member.summary: Height of bounding box (display pixels).

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.CX
member.summary: Centre X, for the crosshair dot.

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.CY
member.summary: Centre Y, for the crosshair dot.

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.LabelY
member.summary: Y position for the text label, slightly above the box.

member.name: P:HumTrack.App.ViewModels.TrackedRect.Label
member.summary: Short label shown next to the box.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .

member.summary: The cached instance for all "CurrentFrame" generated properties.
